title: acrostichum costatum var. rubicundum
intro: Acrostichum costatum var. rubicundum, also known as the Red-brown Leathery Fern, is a variety of the Acrostichum costatum plant, a type of fern that belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Acrostichum costatum var. rubicundum include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by drying and crushing the leaves, and then infusing them in hot water to create a tea that can be used to treat various health conditions.
